title: feat: add alibaba qwen text and vision models
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Qwen joins the swarm
gist.blurb: We've added Alibaba's powerful Qwen models to the API, including dedicated coding and vision-language models. Time to give your apps some serious reasoning upgrades.
gist.summary: Added Alibaba's Qwen text, coder, and vision models to the API, while streamlining our available model list.
gist.impact: Developers can now access qwen-coder-large, qwen-large (with 1M context), and qwen-vision for advanced reasoning, coding, and image understanding tasks.
gist.visual_concept: The bee and the monitor robot interacting with three distinct elements representing text, code, and vision. A multi-screen setup or three glowing floating tablets. The bee wearing wizard glasses for 'reasoning'.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny wizard glasses and a chunky monitor robot looking at three glowing screens showing code, text, and a picture. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny wizard glasses and a chunky monitor robot looking at three glowing screens showing code, text, and a picture. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
